title: Stone Equality
description: All stones can be used like cobblestone in various recipes.
body:
Andesite, Calcite, Diorite, Granite, Tuff...

_These "special stones" have been nothing but annoying to many people. They all take up space, and they're not really... useful other than decoration._

**But I want to give these special stones a chance for once, and make them genuinely special.**

---
*So now you can use MOST of these stones in crafting recipes as if they were Cobblestone. See also: [Stone (disambiguation)](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Stone_(disambiguation))*

###### no cracked blocks though, cus they're cracked
